description:
THE FALL. Absolutely sick with excitement to announce the HABROMANIA Kickstarter prelaunch page is UP! You can get a sneak peek of the page and can get notified the moment that the kickstarter opens for real and the free playable demo drops! 

The link below!
https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/236979314/habromania 

WE'RE ALMOST THERE, GANG! I'll let you know when we officially announce the day the demo drops, but right now we have it scheduled for late September, hopefully right in time for fall. In the meantime, please check out the kickstarter prelaunch and wishlist the game on steam! I can't believe it's only like a month away (should all go well)...   I am absolutely a wreck of nerve and excitement and terror as we try to jam everything we can into the last month of development. Anyway, here is the opening cutscene of Alice tumbling down the rabbit hole. 


Thanks @angelicaagelviz for her help on this animation!
